caption: THE BIGGEST WIN · ROBOCUP@WORK 2025 · MAGDEBURG, GERMANY
title: 24 countries. One robot from India.
body: The international robotics finals at Otto-von-Guericke University. Team RoboManipal entered as the only team from the subcontinent and finished inside the top eight. Quarterfinals at the world stage.

caption: THE RETURN · ROBOCUP@WORK 2025 · SÃO PAULO, BRAZIL
title: Same robot. Different hemisphere.
body: The year's second international final. The robot still knew where it was.

caption: THE NEAR-PERFECT · ABU ROBOCON 2024 NATIONALS
title: Systematic testing until the scoresheet said 99.
body: ABU Robocon national qualification, stage 1. Every subsystem validated twice. One point left on the table.

caption: UNDERWATER · IISc ROBONAUTICA 2025
title: Runners-up, autonomous underwater vehicles.
body: Building and racing an AUV at IISc Bangalore. The team placed second, one bracket away from first.

caption: ALGORITHMS · AETHER BYTESBATTLE 2025
title: National winners.
body: Competitive programming. The kind of contest you prep for at 2 AM and solve at 2:03 AM.

caption: OPEN SOURCE · ADVANCE-CONV-BENCHMARKS
title: Published. Installable. Public.
body: A Python library benchmarking every convolution variant: FLOPs, parameters, PyTorch and TensorFlow. Ships via pip install advance-conv-benchmarks and runs anywhere.
